zh.lifeSummary: 當Edmund Beaufort Holland 2nd Duke of Somerset於1406年9月26日出生在英國米德萊可維斯特明斯特時，他的父親John Beaufort 1st Earl of Somerset33歲，母親Lady Margaret Holland Duchess of Clarence20歲。他於1426年與Eleanor Beauchamp在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和6個女兒的父母。他於1455年登記服兵役。他去世於1455年5月22日在英國賀特福爾享年48歲，埋葬在英國賀特福爾聖 阿爾班斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Edmund Beaufort Holland 2nd Duke of Somerset于1406年9月26日出生在英国米德萊可維斯特明斯特时，他的父亲John Beaufort 1st Earl of Somerset33岁，母亲Lady Margaret Holland Duchess of Clarence20岁。他于1426年与Eleanor Beauchamp在英国英格兰格盧斯特斯爾结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和6个女儿的父母。他于1455年登记服兵役。他去世于1455年5月22日在英国賀特福爾享年48岁，埋葬在英国賀特福爾聖 阿爾班斯。

nameMeanings.name: Beaufort
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of Beaufort . The surname Beauford is rare in Britain.

nameMeanings.name: Holland
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English, German, Dutch, Danish, Norwegian, Swedish, French, and Jewish (Ashkenazic): habitational name from Holland, a province of the Netherlands.

English: habitational name from Downholland or Upholland (Lancashire), Hulland (Derbyshire), the Parts of Holland, one of the three administrative subdivisions of Lincolnshire, any of the four places called Hoyland (southern Yorkshire), and possibly Great and Little Holland (Essex). The placenames all derive from Old English hōh ‘heel, spur of land’ + land ‘land’.

English: habitational name either from Hoeland (Farm) in Bury (Sussex), or from Holland's Barn in Albourne (Sussex). The placename in Bury has the same etymology as in 1 above, while the placename in Albourne may derive from Old English hol ‘hole, hollow’ + land ‘land’.

variants.name: Hollands
meanings: English: variant of Holland , especially 3, with post-medieval excrescent -s.

variants.name: Howland
meanings: History: Howland was the name of three Quaker brothers, original settlers in Marshfield, MA. They were from Huntingdonshire, England. The eldest, John Howland (c. 1593–1672) was a passenger on the Mayflower, servant to Gov. John Carver, who died in the first winter at Plymouth Colony.

variants.name: Hollander
meanings: Dutch (also Den Hollander), German (also Holländer), English, Swedish, and Jewish (Ashkenazic): habitational name for someone from Holland (see Holland 1).

variants.name: Holand
meanings: English and Scottish: variant of   Holland  .
Norwegian: habitational name from about twenty farmsteads so named, composed of Old Norse hár ‘high’ + land ‘land, field’, denoting a high-lying farm.

variants.name: Aland
meanings: Scandinavian (Åland): topographic name from the Åland Islands in the Gulf of Bothnia.

English: topographic name from Middle English atte lande (Old French laund) ‘dweller at the glade or pasture’, or sometimes perhaps, ‘dweller at the old cultivated land(s)’ from Old English eald, ald ‘old’ + land ‘land’.

nameMeanings.name: Edmund
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old English personal name derived from ēad ‘prosperity, riches’ + mund ‘protector’. It was borne by several early royal and saintly figures, including a 9th-century king of East Anglia killed by invading Danes, allegedly for his adherence to Christianity. In the 16th and 17th centuries, there was a good deal of interchange between Edmund and Edward.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Edmund Beaufort Holland 2nd Duke of Somerset was born on 26 September 1406, in Westminster, Middlesex, England, his father, John Beaufort 1st Earl of Somerset, was 33 and his mother, Lady Margaret Holland Duchess of Clarence, was 20. He married Eleanor Beauchamp in 1426, in Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 6 daughters. He registered for military service in 1455. He died on 22 May 1455, in Hertfordshire, England, at the age of 48, and was buried in St Albans, Hertfordshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Edmund Beaufort Holland 2nd Duke of Somerset est né le 26 septembre 1406, à Westminster, Middlesex, Angleterre, son père, John Beaufort 1st Earl of Somerset, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Lady Margaret Holland Duchess of Clarence, avait 20 ans. Il a épousé Eleanor Beauchamp en 1426, à Gloucestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 6 filles. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1455. Il est décédé le 22 mai 1455, à Hertfordshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 48 ans, et a été enterré à St Albans, Hertfordshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Edmund Beaufort Holland 2nd Duke of Somerset am 26. September 1406 in Westminster, Middlesex, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Beaufort 1st Earl of Somerset 33 und seine Mutter Lady Margaret Holland Duchess of Clarence 20. Er hat 1426 in Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom Eleanor Beauchamp geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Er hat sich 1455 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. Er starb am 22. Mai 1455 im Alter von 48 Jahren in Hertfordshire, England und wurde in St Albans, Hertfordshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Edmund Beaufort Holland 2nd Duke of Somerset è nato il il 26 settembre 1406 nel Westminster, Middlesex, England, il suo padre, John Beaufort 1st Earl of Somerset, aveva 33 anni e il suo madre, Lady Margaret Holland Duchess of Clarence, aveva 20 anni. Lui sposato Eleanor Beauchamp nel 1426, nel Gloucestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 6 figlie. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1455. Morì il 22 maggio 1455, nel Hertfordshire, England, all'età di 48 anni, e fu sepolto a St Albans, Hertfordshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Edmund Beaufort Holland 2nd Duke of Somersetが1406年9月26日にイギリスミッドレセックスウエストミンスターで生まれた時，父John Beaufort 1st Earl of Somersetは33歳，母Lady Margaret Holland Duchess of Clarenceは20歳であった。1426年にイギリスイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアでEleanor Beauchampと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼は1455年に兵役登録をした。彼は1455年5月22日にイギリスハートフォードシュアイアで48歳で死去し，イギリスハートフォードシュアイアスト アルバンスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Edmund Beaufort Holland 2nd Duke of Somerset(이)가 1406년 9월 26일 영국 미들레세스 웨스트민스터에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Beaufort 1st Earl of Somerset(은)는 33세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Margaret Holland Duchess of Clarence(은)는 20세였다. 그는 1426년 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르에서 Eleanor Beauchamp(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1455년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 그는 1455년 5월 22일 영국 허트퍼드실르에서 48세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 허트퍼드실르 스트 알반스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Edmund Beaufort Holland 2nd Duke of Somerset nasceu em 26 de setembro de 1406, em Westminster, Middlesex, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Beaufort 1st Earl of Somerset, tinha 33 anos e sua mãe, Lady Margaret Holland Duchess of Clarence, tinha 20 anos. Ele casou-se com Eleanor Beauchamp em 1426, em Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 6 filhas. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1455. Ele faleceu em 22 de maio de 1455, em Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, com 48 anos, e foi sepultado em St Albans, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra.

ru.St James Palace, Westminster, Middlesex,: ст джемес' чурч, вестминстир, миддлесекс, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Edmund Beaufort Holland 2nd Duke of Somerset родился 26 сентября 1406 г. в местности вестминстир, миддлесекс, Англия, его отцу по имени John Beaufort 1st Earl of Somerset было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Lady Margaret Holland Duchess of Clarence, 20. Он женился на женщине по имени Eleanor Beauchamp в 1426 г. в местности глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 6 дочерей. В 1455 году он поступил на военную службу. Он умер 22 мая 1455 г. в местности хиртфордшир, Англия в возрасте 48 лет и был похоронен в местности ст албанс, хиртфордшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Edmund Beaufort Holland 2nd Duke of Somerset nació el 26 de septiembre de 1406, en Westminster, Middlesex, Inglaterra, su papá, John Beaufort 1st Earl of Somerset, tenía 33 años y su mamá, Lady Margaret Holland Duchess of Clarence, tenía 20 años. Se casó con Eleanor Beauchamp en 1426, en Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 6 hijas. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1455. Murió el 22 de mayo de 1455, en Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 48 años, y fue sepultado en St Albans, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra.
